calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-23-2012 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (275 Talbert Street, S.F.)
Off Calendar Dec-16-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Debra Dolch.

Court confirmation is for 50% interest of the property. The sale was confirmed at $364,000.00 (100% interest) based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.

Petition For Citation To Require Personal Representative To Appear And Show The Condition Of The Estate And Reasons Why The Estate Cannot Be Distributed And Closed
Off Calendar Jun-21-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch. Thomas Libby for Wells Fargo Bank.

The Court accepted resignation of Angelique and appointed Debra Dolch as Successor Administrator with limited authority (subject to the Court making some changes to the order). Bond is not required. The Petition for Citation is off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-21-2011 Text Ruling

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-14-2011 Continued To Jun-21-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Citation To Require Personal Representative To Appear And Show The Condition Of The Estate And Reasons Why The Estate Cannot Be Distributed And Closed
Off Calendar Apr-20-2011 Continued To Jun-21-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elizabeth MacDonald specially appearing on behalf of Petitioner.

The Court approved the petition for authority to issue a citation to Angelique Mahan to appear on June 21, 2011 to show cause as to why the Estate cannot be distributed and closed. The matter was also continued June 21, to 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. MacDonald is to submit a proposed order and prepare the citation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Sandberg.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order
